attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  
       ELXAL.GL_SL_LINK_ID
      ,ELXAL.GL_SL_LINK_TABLE
      ,WI_INV.GLOBAL_NAME
      ,WI_INV.invoice_distribution_id
      ,WI_INV.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY    
      ,WI_INV.VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_AMT          
      ,WI_INV.INVOICE_ID                    
      ,WI_INV.OLD_DIST_LINE_NUMBER          
      ,WI_INV.OLD_DISTRIBUTION_ID           
      ,WI_INV.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID      
      ,WI_INV.PRICE_VAR_CODE_COMBINATION_ID 
      ,WI_INV.RATE_VAR_CODE_COMBINATION_ID  
      ,WI_INV.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE         
      ,WI_INV.DD_BK_COMPANY_CD              
      ,WI_INV.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
      ,WI_INV.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
      ,WI_INV.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
      ,WI_INV.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  
      ,WI_INV.RU_DV_USD_AMT                 
      ,WI_INV.RU_FUNCTIONAL_AMT   
FROM  
       $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_LINES ELXAL
         INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_DISTRIB_LINKS ELXDL
          ON ELXAL.ae_header_id = ELXDL.ae_header_id AND
           	 ELXAL.ae_line_num = ELXDL.ae_line_num   AND
             ELXAL.GLOBAL_NAME=ELXDL.GLOBAL_NAME
         INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_VENDOR_INV_DISTRIB_WITH_AMT  WI_INV 
          ON ELXDL.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_1 = WI_INV.invoice_distribution_id AND
             ELXDL.GLOBAL_NAME=WI_INV.GLOBAL_NAME
   WHERE
       ELXDL.source_distribution_type = 'AP_INV_DIST' AND       	
       ELXDL.upg_batch_id is null AND
       ELXAL.application_id=200 AND
       ELXDL.application_id=200 AND 
       ELXAL.GLOBAL_NAME='BE' AND
       ELXAL.accounting_class_code<>'LIABILITY'

SELECT    
                 STMJL.JE_HEADER_ID AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT 
                 ,STMJL.JE_LINE_NUM AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
 ,STMJL.GLOBAL_NAME AS GLOBAL_NAME
                 ,WIXDL.DD_BK_COMPANY_CD AS BK_COMPANY_CD                 
                 ,WIXDL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                 ,WIXDL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  
                 ,WIXDL.RU_FUNCTIONAL_AMT AS DV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  
                 ,WIXDL.RU_DV_USD_AMT AS DV_USD_AMT         
                 ,WIXDL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
                 ,WIXDL.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY AS VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY
                 ,WIXDL.VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_AMT          
                 ,WIXDL.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD        
		FROM  

               (
 			       SELECT 
				 JE_HEADER_ID,                  
				 JE_LINE_NUM,                 
                 REFERENCE_2,                   
				REFERENCE_3,                  
                 GLOBAL_NAME
                FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_GL_JE_LINES
				WHERE STATUS='P' AND GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
				UNION ALL
				SELECT 
				 JE_HEADER_ID,                  
				 JE_LINE_NUM,                 
                 REFERENCE_2,                   
				 REFERENCE_3,                  
                 GLOBAL_NAME
                FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_GL_JE_LINES_VNDR_INVOICE
				WHERE  GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
				) STMJL
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_import_references ELGIR
         ON  STMJL.JE_HEADER_ID      = ELGIR.JE_HEADER_ID
                AND STMJL.JE_LINE_NUM = ELGIR.JE_LINE_NUM
                AND STMJL.GLOBAL_NAME = ELGIR.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_XLA_DISRIB_LINKS WIXDL
               ON   ELGIR.GL_SL_LINK_ID= WIXDL.GL_SL_LINK_ID 
               AND  ELGIR.GL_SL_LINK_TABLE= WIXDL.GL_SL_LINK_TABLE
               AND  ELGIR.GLOBAL_NAME= WIXDL.GLOBAL_NAME
